scripts.setup: cd packages/backend && ./gradlew build -x test && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev:sagemaker: cd packages/backend && ./gradlew bootRun --args='--spring.profiles.active=workshop' & cd packages/frontend && SAGEMAKER=1 npm run dev & cd packages/frontend && node proxy.js
scripts.dev:sagemaker:stop: pkill -f 'gradlew bootRun' ; pkill -f 'next dev' ; pkill -f 'node proxy.js' ; echo stopped
